description: Epic container for Milestone 1 of the Streaming Text Rendering project. Covers the two correctness bugs that cause visible breakage: plugin array remount and unsafe markdown sanitization. Must complete before Performance and Polish milestones.
title: Epic: Foundation — Stability & Correctness
